name: Giulio Malavolta

work.note: Official Bocconi sources identify him as Bocconi faculty and advisor.

tracking.note: Official Bocconi faculty pages and CV provide explicit undergraduate, master's, doctoral, postdoctoral, and advisee evidence.

sources.note: Ranking page provides a DBLP author id and a current affiliation, but no lineage details.
The official Bocconi profile states `I completed my Ph.D. in 2019 at Friedrich-Alexander University` and `before that a postdoc at UC Berkeley and at Carnegie Mellon University`.

The official Bocconi CV lists `Friedrich-Alexander University - Ph.D. in Computer Science (with Distinction) ... Advisor: Prof. Dominique Schroder`; `Saarland University - M.Sc. in Computer Science`; `University of Bologna - M.Sc. in Bioinformatics; B.Sc. in Biotechnology`; `University of California, Berkeley - PostDoctoral Fellow (hosted by Prof. Sanjam Garg)`; `Carnegie Mellon University - Research Fellow (hosted by Prof. Vipul Goyal)`; and named postdoc and PhD students including `Pedro Branco`, `Alex Kulpe`, and `Ahmadreza Rahimi`.
The official Bocconi news page states `He earned his PhD in Computer Science from Friedrich-Alexander University.`

summary: Official Bocconi sources state that Giulio Malavolta earned a B.Sc. in Biotechnology and an M.Sc. in Bioinformatics at the University of Bologna, an M.Sc. in Computer Science at Saarland University, a PhD at Friedrich-Alexander University under Dominique Schroder, later held positions hosted by Sanjam Garg and Vipul Goyal, and supervises named postdocs and PhD students.

undergraduate.note: The official Bocconi CV lists `University of Bologna - B.Sc. in Biotechnology`.

masters.note: The official Bocconi CV lists `Saarland University - M.Sc. in Computer Science` and `University of Bologna - M.Sc. in Bioinformatics`.

phd.note: The official Bocconi CV lists `Friedrich-Alexander University - Ph.D. in Computer Science (with Distinction) ... Advisor: Prof. Dominique Schroder`.

postdoc.school: University of California, Berkeley; Carnegie Mellon University
postdoc.note: The official Bocconi CV lists `University of California, Berkeley - PostDoctoral Fellow (hosted by Prof. Sanjam Garg)` and `Carnegie Mellon University - Research Fellow (hosted by Prof. Vipul Goyal)` and also lists named postdocs and Ph.D. students.
